title: My Totem Doll
description: Replaces vanilla totems with autogenerated 2D or 3D totems for EVERY player in Minecraft! Rename your totem to player's nickname to use it's skin.
body: [![Discord link to the "LopyMine's Project" discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9796c521a3261b9a7e4c3eb6b1c3d2dfe4c112.png)](https://discord.gg/NZzxdkrV4s) [![CurseForge Link-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e867d37a2f6ad224258b75aacf6477e777427717.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/my-totem-doll) [![Github Link-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae65154a7b076cd508f14975a27d1e75e3449a1d.png)](https://github.com/LopyMine/my-totem-doll) [![Modrinth Link-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9c43eaea7fc523285ae0981829b84e206672b48.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/my_totem_doll) ## 💬 Description My Totem Doll — Client-Side Fabric Mod which replaces all totems with player dolls. **Rename your totem to any player's nickname to use it's skin.** Also supports capes and custom models! ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ad77a56463f23bd9f744358dbc8cc63b97fa1ec.png) ## 👋 Welcome Screen When you launch game with mod for the first time, you will be greeted with a Welcome Screen. Here you will select your default totem: ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65289777fddd75f6af4922cd162e1bfac5eaf2e_0.webp) ## ⚙️ Configuration ### 1) Rendering You can configure the rendering of totems in the first person. Open My Totem Doll configuration screen from Mod Menu and go to the `Rendering` tab, there you will find options for configuring the left and right hand: ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa1d5f9338a22035f81940f1438fb8c0ee2f4da5.png) ### 2) Standard Doll You can also customize the hands, model, skin textures for your standard totem! ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ba7af2e73cbc7aa4bb562fd2744e30c1d75958_0.webp) ### 3) Selecting Standard Doll Model If you want to change your standard doll model, just hover to `Model Path` button and click on it. After that you will see `Standard Model Selection Screen`, there you can choose your standard doll model. ## 🍃 Refresh Player Skins My Totem Doll also has some commands for refreshing the totem skins: `/my-totem-doll refresh all` - To refresh skins for all loaded players. `/my-totem-doll refresh player []` - To refresh skin for specific player. ## 🧵 Totem Customization You can customize individual totems in the anvil! **Put your totem in the anvil to the first slot to see the Tags menu button. Click on it to open the Tags menu.** ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bcc37c741f5722c7c196795cd996b10f1034ff8.png) ## 🔥 Custom Models You can even add your own models by following this [**wiki**](https://github.com/LopyMine/My-Totem-Doll/wiki/Introduction-%E2%80%A2-About-Custom-Models). A good example is [**My Totem Doll Model Pack**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/my-totem-doll-model-pack) made by community. It has over **40** new models (some were even added to the mod!). ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc18851f29c96cc7910bd216cca8fbfc3303768b_0.webp) ## 🎮 Multiplayer Support You can also see other players' totems! **Without mod on the server.** ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42afb7b8df54a3d445a5c9fb2259516e9f5bb671.png) ## 🧥 Using NameMC Skins Yeah, you also can use NameMC skins on your totems. To use it, just select any player skin, copy skin id, rename your totem to `NameMC | ` and paste copied skin id. And that's all! ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b93c70b53ea9c35f1341c578ff3a093e82eb1f52.png)
